productDisplayName: Lotto Men Black Futura 500 TF Casual Shoes
description: These lotto Future 500 TF shoes reference the soccer cleats in silhouetting and style, but have a flat outsole. Ultra-durable and lightweight, these shoes are designed for casual outings Upper Synthetic leather upper for a comfortable, durable Fit Central lacing system for snug fit Padded mesh insole for breathable comfort Midsole Phylon midsole for cushioning and to help reduce stud pressure Outsole Punto Flex grooves Durable TPU plate with strategically placed circular lugs shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
